g.text: GIMoE: Cluster-Aware Forecasting with Penalty-Guided Residual Experts
Current paper scope: cluster-aware base prediction, penalty-keyed residual experts, and source-to-target transfer through cluster matching.
Reuse matched cluster heads and GIMoE residual experts
for zero-shot transfer or target fine-tuning
